zh.Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Ki: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾
zh.Blore, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Dutton於1421年8月10日出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，他的父親Sir John Dutton32歲，母親Margaret Savage, Lady Audley16歲。他於大約1438年與Lady Anne Touchet結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年10月2日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Dutton于1421年8月10日出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，他的父亲Sir John Dutton32岁，母亲Margaret Savage, Lady Audley16岁。他于大约1438年与Lady Anne Touchet结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年10月2日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布洛爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Dutton was born on 10 August 1421, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Dutton, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, was 16. He married Lady Anne Touchet about 1438. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 2 October 1459, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Dutton est né le 10 août 1421, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Dutton, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Touchet environ 1438. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1459, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Dutton am 10. August 1421 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dutton 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Savage, Lady Audley 16. Er hat um 1438 Lady Anne Touchet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1459 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dutton è nato il il 10 agosto 1421 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Dutton, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Touchet circa 1438. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 2 ottobre 1459, nel Blore, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Duttonが1421年8月10日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir John Duttonは32歳，母Margaret Savage, Lady Audleyは16歳であった。約1438年にLady Anne Touchetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年10月2日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dutton(이)가 1421년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dutton(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Savage, Lady Audley(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1438년 Lady Anne Touchet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 August 1421–23 September 1459: 10 de agosto de 1421–2 de outubro de 1459
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dutton nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1421, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Dutton, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Touchet aproximadamente 1438. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1459, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Dutton родился 10 августа 1421 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Dutton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Touchet около 1438 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 2 октября 1459 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.

Se casó con Lady Anne Touchet aproximadamente 1438. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1459, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 38 años.
